_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: NF1KD ECFC exhibited a time-dependent increase in BrdU incorporation when compared with shCtr ECFC
details: NF1 knockdown ECFC exhibited time-dependent increase in BrdU incorporation compared to control ECFC in response to VEGF
